headline: Gilead Sciences Inc. (GILD): Growing Popularity as Defensive Stock
summary: We just covered the 14 Best Defensive Stocks to Invest In Now and Gilead Sciences, Inc. (NASDAQ:GILD) ranks 4th on this list. Gilead Sciences, Inc. (NASDAQ:GILD) has transitioned away from its volatile COVID-19 treatment revenue from Veklury. headline: A Look At Kymera Therapeutics (KYMR) Valuation After Fast Track News And Gilead Collaboration Progress
summary: The latest move in Kymera Therapeutics (KYMR) stock has been driven by the FDA granting Fast Track designation to KT-621 for moderate to severe eosinophilic asthma, along with progress in its expanded collaboration with Gilead Sciences. See our latest analysis for Kymera Therapeutics.
